zh.Agecroft, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾阿可洛福特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Atherton於1380年出生在英國藍卡爾李時，她的父親Sir William de Atherton II33歲，母親Dame Agnus de Vernon21歲。她和Robert Langley至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.Agecroft, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾阿可洛福特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Atherton于1380年出生在英国藍卡爾李时，她的父亲Sir William de Atherton II33岁，母亲Dame Agnus de Vernon21岁。她和Robert Langley至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Atherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place near Manchester named Atherton, from the Old English personal name Æthelhere + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.
English: habitational name from Hatherton, Staffordshire, from Old English haguthorn + dūn ‘the hill where hawthorn grows’.

English (East Anglia): topographic name from Middle English at ther doune ‘(dweller) on the hill’ (Old English æt thǣre dūne). Through confusion of -don and -ton, Attherdoune was altered to Atherton, Adderton, and Atterton.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Atherton was born in 1380, in Leigh, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir William de Atherton II, was 33 and her mother, Dame Agnus de Vernon, was 21. She had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Robert Langley.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Atherton est née en 1380, à Leigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Atherton II, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Dame Agnus de Vernon, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Robert Langley.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Atherton 1380 in Leigh, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Atherton II 33 und ihre Mutter Dame Agnus de Vernon 21. Sie hatte mit Robert Langley mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Atherton è nata il nel 1380 nel Leigh, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Atherton II, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Dame Agnus de Vernon, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Robert Langley.

ja.Leigh, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアレイグ
ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Athertonが1380年にイギリスランカシュアイアレイグで生まれた時，父Sir William de Atherton IIは33歳，母Dame Agnus de Vernonは21歳であった。彼女はRobert Langleyとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Atherton(이)가 1380년 영국 랭카실르 리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Atherton II(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dame Agnus de Vernon(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Robert Langley(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Atherton nasceu em 1380, em Leigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Atherton II, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Dame Agnus de Vernon, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Robert Langley.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Atherton родилась в 1380 г. в местности лиг, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Atherton II было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Dame Agnus de Vernon, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Robert Langley.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Atherton nació en 1380, en Leigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Atherton II, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Dame Agnus de Vernon, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Robert Langley.
